think_blocks:
The user wants me to identify all temporal segments where Frank Caprio is visible in the video.

1.  **Analyze the Request:**
    *   Target: Frank Caprio (the judge).
    *   Condition: Visible and identifiable.
    *   Segmentation: Start/stop on frame entry/exit or shot boundaries.
    *   Output Format: JSON.

2.  **Scan the Video for Frank Caprio:**
    *   03:25 - 03:29: Frank Caprio is shown on a large screen behind the news anchor. He is visible from the chest up.
    *   03:29 - 03:32: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio at his bench.
    *   03:36 - 03:38: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.
    *   03:40 - 03:41: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.
    *   03:43 - 03:46: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.
    *   03:47 - 03:51: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio with a young girl.
    *   03:54 - 03:58: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking and gesturing.
    *   03:59 - 04:01: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.
    *   04:03 - 04:04: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.
    *   04:04 - 04:09: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio with a young boy.
    *   04:10 - 04:11: Split screen showing Frank Caprio on the right.
    *   04:13 - 04:15: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.
    *   04:19 - 04:20: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.
    *   04:22 - 04:23: Close-up shot of Frank Caprio speaking.

3.  **Define Segments:**
    *   Segment 1: 03:25 - 03:29 (On screen behind anchor)
    *   Segment 2: 03:29 - 03:32 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 3: 03:36 - 03:38 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 4: 03:40 - 03:41 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 5: 03:43 - 03:46 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 6: 03:47 - 03:51 (Close-up with girl)
    *   Segment 7: 03:54 - 03:58 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 8: 03:59 - 04:01 (Close-up)

    *   Segment 10: 04:04 - 04:09 (Close-up with boy)
    *   Segment 11: 04:10 - 04:11 (Split screen)
    *   Segment 12: 04:13 - 04:15 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 13: 04:19 - 04:20 (Close-up)
    *   Segment 14: 04:22 - 04:23 (Close-up)

4.  **Format Output:**
    *   Convert timestamps to seconds.
    *   Determine presence (upper-body, face-only, etc.).
    *   Determine region (center, right, etc.).

    *   03:25 - 03:29: Upper-body, center-left (on screen).

    *   03:36 - 03:38: Upper-body, center.

    *   04:04 - 04:09: Upper-body, center-right.
    *   04:10 - 04:11: Upper-body, right.
    *   04:13 - 04:15: Upper-body, center.
    *   04:19 - 04:20: Upper-body, center.
    *   04:22 - 04:23: Upper-body, center.

5.  **Final Review:** Check timestamps against video.
    *   03:25 start, 03:29 end. Correct.
    *   03:29 start, 03:32 end. Correct.
    *   03:36 start, 03:38 end. Correct.
